name: Future Generation Australia Limited
analysis: FGX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3430. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.3468 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.3430, stop A$1.2919, target A$1.3777. Risk/reward is 0.68:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
